title: CreatiVault Video Audit
description: Submit TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts for hook, script, storyboard, benchmark, and viral-factor analysis. Pricing: $0.80/audit and $0.08/media upload.

operation.title: What do you want to do?
operation.description: Choose the workflow. Failed requests and status polling are not charged.

videoUrl.title: Video URL
videoUrl.description: TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts URL.

fileUrl.title: Media file URL
fileUrl.description: Public file URL for media upload before audit.

uploadedOssKey.title: Uploaded OSS key
uploadedOssKey.description: OSS key returned by media upload.

taskId.title: Task ID
taskId.description: Task ID for status, data, export, or result operations.

waitForCompletion.title: Wait for task completion
waitForCompletion.description: Poll task status before finishing. Status polling itself is free.

maxPollAttempts.title: Max poll attempts
maxPollAttempts.description: Maximum polling attempts before timing out.

maxRetries.title: Max retries
maxRetries.description: Retries for temporary rate-limit and server errors.
